# 🛠️ Skills Definition

## Overview
This file defines the skill system used for matching workers with jobs.

---

## 🎯 Purpose
- Enable accurate job matching
- Categorize workers
- Improve recommendations

---

## 🔹 Skill Categories

### Construction
- Mason
- Carpenter
- Painter
- Electrician

### Services
- Plumber
- Driver
- Delivery Worker
- Cleaner

### Technical
- Mechanic
- Technician

---

## 📍 Skill Attributes
Each skill includes:
- Skill name
- Experience level
- Rating
- Availability

---

## ⚙️ Usage
- Workers select skills during registration
- Jobs require specific skills
- Matching engine compares both

---

## 🚀 Future Scope
- Skill certification
- AI-based skill suggestions
- Skill upgrade recommendations
